title: Shopify Store Products Scraper
description: Provide one or more Shopify store domains or URLs to extract their full product catalog (products, variants, prices, images). No login or API key required.

storeUrls.title: Shopify Store URLs / Domains
storeUrls.description: List of Shopify store domains or URLs, e.g. "allbirds.com" or "https://www.allbirds.com".

maxProductsPerStore.title: Max Products Per Store
maxProductsPerStore.description: Maximum number of products to scrape per store. Set to 0 for all products.

productType.title: Filter by Product Type
productType.description: Only keep products whose product type matches this exactly (case-insensitive). Leave empty for all.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Most Shopify stores serve products.json openly. Enable proxies (residential recommended) for stores behind bot protection.
